items.name: Chandan Chaudhary
items.quote: I collaborated closely with Shubham on several of Huzzle's most demanding AI initiatives, spanning the end-to-end AI-driven hiring process - from talent profile screening and intelligent interview question design through interview evaluation and matching talent to client requirements. She consistently translated ambiguous objectives into well-defined, implementable requirements and demonstrated strong prioritisation, sequencing the roadmap to deliver the highest-impact features first while keeping product and engineering aligned throughout delivery. Shubham continues to be a thoughtful and dependable product partner, and one I value working alongside at Huzzle.

items.name: Prakhar Kabra
items.quote: I have found Shubham's performance to be exceptional when compared to other well-qualified individuals in similar roles. Her main strengths include quick updates, impeccable skills in gathering and analyzing requirements, and a deep understanding of our company's needs. She consistently demonstrates availability and responsiveness, making collaboration with her a seamless and productive experience. Furthermore, Shubham's humility and willingness to collaborate make her a pleasure to work with.
